landing.heroDescription: 用相机追踪热量、用 AI 扫描体脂、可视化蜕变进程 — 一款应用全搞定。
landing.featuresSubtitle: 前沿 AI 驱动，让追踪毫不费力，让成果清晰可见。
landing.feature1Desc: 拍一张餐食照片，AI 即刻估算热量、营养素和份量。
landing.feature2Desc: 上传一张照片，获取 AI 估算的体脂率和置信度评分。
landing.feature3Desc: 通过 AI 生成的预览，查看您在目标体脂率下可能的外形。
landing.feature4Desc: 借助丰富的运动库记录锻炼。追踪组数、次数和渐进负荷。
landing.feature5Desc: 通过精美的交互式图表直观展示体重、热量和身体成分趋势。
landing.feature6Desc: 获取根据您的目标和偏好量身定制的个性化膳食建议和训练计划。
landing.howItWorksSubtitle: 三个简单步骤，成就更好的你。
landing.step1Desc: 几秒钟即可创建免费账户。设定您的身体目标和偏好。
landing.step2Desc: 用相机记录餐食、记录锻炼、监控体重趋势。
landing.step3Desc: 通过 AI 洞察、体脂扫描和蜕变预览见证您的进步。
landing.pricingSubtitle: 按需付费。每项 AI 功能都有明确的积分消耗。
landing.planFreeFeature2: 食物相机分析（1 积分）
landing.planProFeature2: 解锁所有 AI 功能
landing.planProFeature4: AI 膳食推荐（2 积分）
landing.planPackFeature3: 适用于所有 AI 功能
landing.testimonial1Quote: 食物相机简直是神器。拍个照就能追踪一切，再也不用猜热量了。
landing.testimonial2Quote: 看到蜕变预览给了我所需的动力。它让我的目标变得真实且可达成。
landing.testimonial3Quote: 体脂扫描精准得令人难以置信。无需昂贵的 DEXA 扫描，我就能每周追踪减脂进度。
landing.heroProof: Free body scan — no sign-up required.
landing.whyReturnSubtitle: Whether you're cutting for summer, prepping for a wedding, or chasing a body profile deadline — this is how the gap closes.
landing.whyReturn1Desc: Day one: you see what your body could look like at your goal weight. That image stops being motivation and starts being the benchmark you measure against every single week.
landing.whyReturn2Desc: Each scan shows your current body next to your goal preview. Body fat estimate trending. Shape changing. The distance between 'now' and 'target' shifting. That's not hope — that's a visual record.
landing.whyReturn3Desc: By week 8, you have a timeline showing where you started, where you are, and how far you've come. Side-by-side photos that document your journey. That's what no calorie counter can give you.
landing.trustSubtitle: We know uploading body photos requires trust. Here's exactly how we handle it.
landing.trust1Desc: All photos are encrypted in transit and at rest. We use industry-standard TLS encryption and secure cloud storage.
landing.trust2Desc: Your photos are sent to AI services (OpenAI, Replicate) solely for analysis. They are never stored by third parties, never used for training, and never shared.
landing.trust3Desc: You can delete all your photos and data at any time. When you delete, it's gone — no hidden copies, no backups retained.
landing.trust4Desc: Body fat estimates are visual AI approximations — not equivalent to DEXA or clinical measurements. Transformation previews are motivational visualizations, not predictions. Always consult a healthcare professional.

consent.title: 必需同意项

consent.sensitiveData: 我同意按照隐私政策中所述，收集和处理敏感个人数据（民族、身体测量、健康相关数据、身体图像）。
consent.ageVerification: 我确认本人已年满 18 周岁。

footer.description: AI 驱动的健身追踪，助您达成体型蜕变目标。

bodyfatAccuracy.a: 我们的 AI 基于视觉分析提供大致的体脂率估算。结果仅为近似值，可能因照片质量、光线和姿势而异。如需临床级精确度，我们建议进行 DEXA 扫描或咨询医疗专业人士。此非医疗测量。

credits.a: 每项 AI 功能消耗一定数量的积分。免费用户每月获得 10 积分。Pro 订阅用户每月获得 100 积分。您也可以购买永不过期的积分包。

foodCamera.a: 食物相机使用视觉 AI 识别食物并估算份量。结果为近似值 — 实际热量和宏量可能因份量、配料和烹饪方式而异。您可随时手动调整估算值。请勿依赖这些估算来管理医疗饮食需求。

transformation.a: 它使用 AI 图像编辑生成创意可视化，展示您在不同体脂率下可能的外形。这些为艺术渲染，非实际结果的预测或保证。个人结果取决于遗传、饮食、运动等诸多因素。

cancel.q: 我可以随时取消订阅吗？
cancel.a: 是的，您可以随时取消 Pro 订阅。您将保留积分直至当前计费周期结束。购买的积分包永不过期，与订阅状态无关。

dataSecurity.a: 您的数据经加密并遵循行业最佳实践存储。您上传的照片会安全传输至第三方 AI 服务（如 OpenAI、Google 和 Anthropic）进行分析 — 详见我们的隐私政策。我们不会出售您的数据。您可随时请求删除您的数据。

photosPrivacy.q: What happens to my photos after I upload them?
photosPrivacy.a: Your photos are encrypted and sent securely to AI services for analysis. They are never stored by third parties, never used for AI training, and never shared with anyone. You can delete all your photos and data at any time from your profile settings.

weeklyReturn.q: Why should I come back every week?
weeklyReturn.a: Each weekly scan updates your body fat estimate and adds to your progress timeline. Over time, you'll see a clear trend line and side-by-side photo comparisons. This visual proof of progress is what keeps people motivated far longer than calorie apps or workout logs alone.

notMedical.a: No. Devenira is a motivational and tracking tool, not a medical device. Body fat estimates are AI approximations, not clinical measurements. Transformation previews are visualizations, not predictions. Always consult a healthcare professional before starting any weight loss or fitness program.
